description_long: This is a dark green glass bottle with a classic, rounded body and a long, narrow neck, topped with a natural cork stopper. The front of the bottle features a large, vintage-style paper label with sepia-toned artwork and text, giving it an old-world, artisanal appearance. The label is rectangular and centrally placed, with ornate borders and a detailed illustration, possibly depicting a vineyard or a traditional scene. The bottle's surface is smooth and glossy, reflecting light subtly, and the glass appears thick and sturdy. No visible liquid is present inside, and the bottle is free from any visible damage or deformation. The overall design suggests it is intended for wine or a similar beverage, suitable for display or use in urban settings such as restaurants, cafes, or homes.
description: A dark green glass bottle with a cork stopper and a vintage-style paper label on the front, featuring ornate artwork and text. The bottle is smooth, glossy, and free of visible damage.
description_view_0: The bottle is seen from a slight angle, showing its dark green body and the edge of the paper label on the right side.
description_view_1: The front view displays the full vintage-style label with detailed artwork and text, as well as the cork stopper at the top.
description_view_2: This side view shows the bottle's smooth, dark green surface and the edge of the label, with no other distinguishing features.
description_view_3: The back view reveals the plain, unadorned dark green glass surface, with no label or markings visible.
attribute_label_or_branding: A large, rectangular, vintage-style paper label with sepia artwork and text is present on the front of the bottle.
